category_sources: source_facts.description says "Tunnel (TUN) interface for SOCKS and HTTP proxies"; official README describes a tunnel interface for HTTP and SOCKS proxies on multiple platforms.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is "tun2proxy"; official GitHub README heading is "tun2proxy".
docs_sources: Official README points to the GitHub wiki for additional information and includes a CLI reference section.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/tun2proxy/tun2proxy; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies TUN, SOCKS, and HTTP proxy support; official README lists HTTP, SOCKS4/SOCKS5, virtual DNS, UDP gateway, and setup features.
